featureName: OPS-003: Home-Lab Deploy Handoff — GAP-06 + BUG-067-001
deliveryHandoffJustification: Operator activation packet for two already-committed runtime changes (GAP-06 / spec 054 Scope 9 and BUG-067-001 / ML_LOG_LEVEL fail-loud SST). The runtime delivery and its certification live in their own packets (specs/054-notification-intelligence-handler promoted to done; BUG-067-001 fix in commit 78b293cc). This OPS-003 packet ships ONLY the home-lab deploy/verify/rollback handoff documentation (objective.md + runbook.md). The live home-lab apply is deferred to the operator and was intentionally NOT run this session: the host is saturated with concurrent heavy builds, so no build / deploy / push / CI / docker command was executed. Terminates at delivered_pending_activation (mode adapter-readiness-to-packet, terminalAliases [delivered_pending_activation]); NOT promoted to done because live-runtime activation evidence is the operator's to produce at apply time.

implement.reason: Handoff packet ships documentation only; the runtime delivery (GAP-06 + BUG-067-001) already shipped in commits cf490e55 and 78b293cc under their own packets.

test.reason: No new runtime code in this packet; the shipped changes were tested in specs/054 (unit SCN-054-027/029, integration SCN-054-028/030, e2e arbitration+ack) and BUG-067-001. Live home-lab runtime evidence is deferred to operator apply.

chaos.reason: Scope kind is deploy-pointer; live chaos/runtime exercise defers to operator activation at apply time.

stress.reason: No SLA owned by this handoff packet; SLO checks happen on the live home-lab stack at apply time.

executionHistory.summary: Authored the home-lab deploy handoff packet for this session's two runtime-relevant shippable changes: GAP-06 (spec 054 Scope 9 — notification decision engine routes user-facing decisions through the shared spec-078 surfacing controller; observable post-deploy via smackerel_surfacing_*{producer="notification"} on the core /metrics) and BUG-067-001 (ML sidecar NO-DEFAULTS fix requiring fail-loud ML_LOG_LEVEL). READ-ONLY inspection only — NO build/deploy/push/CI/docker command was run (host saturated with concurrent heavy builds). Verified the ML_LOG_LEVEL flow end-to-end: SST key services.ml.log_level (value 'info') in config/smackerel.yaml -> scripts/commands/config.sh emits ML_LOG_LEVEL via required_value (fail-loud) -> single env render template -> renamed to app.env in the deploy bundle path (config.sh: grep -v '^# Generated: ' OUTPUT_FILE > STAGE_DIR/app.env). CAVEAT CONFIRMED: ML_LOG_LEVEL IS in the bundle generation path for SHA 78b293cc; the only failure mode is reusing a stale pre-78b293cc bundle with the new ml image. Endpoint paths corrected to repo reality: core liveness /api/health (not /healthz), core readiness /readyz, ml /health (returns model_loaded). Documented push -> CI (.github/workflows/build.yml) -> promote.sh -> apply -> verify -> rollback (pointer-swap) with exact commands, deploy source SHA 78b293cc, and home-lab ports 41001/41002. Noted related pending home-lab deploys (specs 084/087/088) and the A/B synthesis model supersession (deepseek-r1:7b -> qwen3:30b-a3b) to reconcile at apply time. Left the packet UNCOMMITTED for the orchestrator to commit. Terminates at delivered_pending_activation; live activation is the operator's call.

scopeProgress.name: Author the home-lab deploy/verify/rollback handoff for GAP-06 + BUG-067-001

deferredActivations.item: Live home-lab apply + verify of core+ml images and the home-lab-<sourceSha> config bundle (with ML_LOG_LEVEL present)
deferredActivations.condition: operator pushes the 6 commits, CI publishes build-manifest-<sourceSha>.yaml, and the operator runs promote.sh/apply against the real home-lab host once the dev host quiesces
deferredActivations.expectedActivation: operator runs `bash scripts/deploy/promote.sh --target home-lab --build-manifest <path>` then `./smackerel.sh deploy-target home-lab verify`

notes: Deploy source SHA 78b293cc. NEW required SST key this session: services.ml.log_level -> ML_LOG_LEVEL (recommended 'info'); ML sidecar fails loud without it. ML_LOG_LEVEL verified present in the deploy bundle app.env path for 78b293cc — the only risk is reusing a stale pre-78b293cc bundle. Related pending home-lab deploys: specs 084/087/088 (open-knowledge reasoning + genuine synthesis + runtime-switchable models/GPU A/B); A/B synthesis model superseded deepseek-r1:7b -> qwen3:30b-a3b (reconcile at apply). Packet left uncommitted for the orchestrator. No build/deploy/push/CI/docker command was run while authoring this packet.
